abilities.name: Demise (Revivify)
abilities.text: Once per game. When this model is killed, place it anywhere on the centerline, then it heals 9.

abilities.name: Invert the Constants
abilities.text: Once per turn. Before choosing a model to activate, if this model has already activated this turn, it may mark three fieldwork objectives as uncompleted. If it does so, it gains a Slow token and may immediately activate a second time.

actions.name: Aetheric Tear
actions.effects: Enemy models within (melee)2" of the target are dealt 1 damage.

triggers.name: Mass of Tentacles
triggers.text: Move enemy models within (melee)2" of this model 2". Deal 1 damage to models moved this way.

actions.name: Whispered Madness
actions.effects: Target gains a Slow or a Staggered token. For each raise this action receives, a different model in range receives the same token.

triggers.name: Split Across Worlds
triggers.text: Once per turn. Deal 3 damage to a model that gained a token from this action, then an ally within range heals 3.

triggers.name: Chart the Unknown
triggers.text: Mark a fieldwork objective complete for the value of one of the top 5 cards in this model's discard pile.

triggers.name: A Whisper to a Scream
triggers.text: The target gains a Slow or a Staggered token.

actions.name: Converging Ley Lines
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Ally only. This action ignores range and LoS.
actions.effects: Move an ally up to 4" toward the centerline.
